title: Light rain and showers expected on Tuesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - In the latest weather forecast from the South Arrican Weather Service, there are no weather alerts for Tuesday 3 June.


> You can expect the following:


Western CapeFine over the eastern interior at first with morning fog patches, otherwise partly cloudy cool but cloudy in thesouth-west with light rain and showers, spreading along the west and south coast from the afternoon.The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh south-westerly. The expected UVB sunburn index: Low

Western half of the Eastern CapeFine and cool to cold, becoming cloudy along the coast in the afternoon, with light rain in places. The wind along the coast will be light north-westerly at first, otherwise fresh to strong south-westerly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFine and cool. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate westerly, becoming moderate to fresh south-westerly from late morning, but light north-westerly in the evening.


> Expected temperatures for Tuesday:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
